queries.question: List all the dissertations, also show the thesis proposals supervised by Dr. Jane Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Students.FullName
FROM Students
WHERE Students.Academic_Writing = "Dissertation" OR Students.Academic_Writing = "Thesis Proposal" AND Students.Academic_Supervisor = "Dr. Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:Academic_Writing ?academic_writing_w .
  ?students p:Academic_Writing ?academic_writing_w2 .
  ?students p:Academic_Supervisor ?academic_supervisor_w .
  FILTER((STR(?academic_writing_w) = "Dissertation" || (STR(?academic_writing_w2) = "Thesis Proposal" && STR(?academic_supervisor_w) = "Dr. Jane Smith")))
}

queries.question: Give me all dissertations and thesis proposals supervised by Dr. Jane Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Students.FullName
FROM Students
WHERE (Students.Academic_Writing = "Dissertation" OR Students.Academic_Writing = "Thesis Proposal") AND Students.Academic_Supervisor = "Dr. Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:Academic_Writing ?academic_writing_w .
  ?students p:Academic_Writing ?academic_writing_w2 .
  ?students p:Academic_Supervisor ?academic_supervisor_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?academic_writing_w) = "Dissertation" || STR(?academic_writing_w2) = "Thesis Proposal")) && STR(?academic_supervisor_w) = "Dr. Jane Smith"))
}
